2142290.name: KEEP OUT : Black Protein
2142290.description:
KEEP OUT : Black Protein


KEEP OUT : Black Protein is a rogue-lite, hack and slash, TPS, action game that tells the past story of WeaverActive's previous release, KEEP OUT.
The numerous items randomly dropped after defeating enemies who flock to the player create a new synergy with the character's ability.
You can create your own new combination and clear method by repeating the game.
Become your own toy and protect the world of toys from corrupted toys!

Discover powerful new items and upgrade your skills


Various items guarantee different experiences and new challenges every time. The more items you collect, the more effects you have
The more you mix and use, the more amazing the compound effect can be. And you can upgrade your skills even
more This allows you to create a stronger synergy with your items.

Unlock new play method


Unlock the new toy package together in the world of toys.
Each can master its own combat style and a variety of skills.
Stage, enemies, and items are randomly generated, so you can experience different things each time you play.

Game mods


Different horror mode than normal mode allows for a wide variety of puzzles and scary, startling jumpscare elements,
so rogue-lite don't work
You can experience various fun and fear of toys in different new ways of playing games.

Play alone or co-op.


You can play either solo or with up to three other players
